prompt: A dynamic photoreal action shot of a male rock climber mid-move on a steep overhanging granite wall at sunset. Climber wears chalk-dusted hands, red climbing shoes, a green tank top. His body is in a powerful dynamic stance reaching for the next hold. Sunset golden-orange light raking across the textured rock face, climber in sharp focus, shallow depth of field with the valley below soft and out of focus. Sports photography aesthetic, motion captured at peak action.
